name: QEMU ESP32-C3 + virtual RGB panel
description: Real flash image on Espressif QEMU with the esp_rgb display, input agent, and emulated NIC (tier 2: serial/logs/screenshot/tap/gpio/button/snapshot/serve; firmware must drive esp_lcd_qemu_rgb, run esprite_qemu_agent, and serve HTTP over openeth; image via ESPRITE_QEMU_IMAGE)
